aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

hasSelection.description:
Indicates if the table has a single column of checkboxes for selecting
rows (used for mobile styling)

isSelectable.description: Indicates that the current row's checkbox is selectable / not disabled

isSelected.description: Indicates the current row has been selected

hasActions.description:
Indicates if the table has a dedicated column for actions
(used for mobile styling and desktop action hover behavior)

isExpandable.description: Indicates if the row will have an expanded row

isExpandedRow.description: Indicates if the row will be the expanded row
